name: Copper Pennies
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the carrots and place them in a large bowl.
2. Saute 1 onion and 1 green pepper in 1/2 cup oil until soft.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the sauteed vegetables.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then simmer until blended.
5. Pour the sauce over the carrots and mix well.
6. Cover and refrigerate. The dish can be served warm or cold.
7. Remember to brush your teeth after enjoying this meal.
